name: Qualifying Session
description: Baseline qualifying-session preset for Phase 1 scenario selection and future comparison workflows.

provenance.notes: Captures a qualifying-session category for selection without claiming current sporting-rule completeness.

assumptionNotes.note: Segment timings and knockout rules are summarized coarsely because detailed session orchestration is outside Phase 1 scope.

provenance.notes: Phase 1 only needs an honest category distinction from race sessions.
